author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for in-process MCP transport (embedded server via createLinkedTransportPair channel-based message passing — parity with CC InProcessTransport.ts). Not addressable in a cleanup pass: requires a new McpTransport impl using tokio mpsc channels, paired-half construction, and integration with the McpTransport trait at src/mcp.rs:123. Used for Computer Use MCP, Chrome MCP, SDK-mode servers. Parent audit #523.
